theme_archetype: Hybrid: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) for Dark Mode, Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Light Mode
design_philosophy: A polished, developer-focused AI interface. Deep void black background with bright neon cyan/teal accents in dark mode, falling back to a clean, stark high-contrast light mode. Strict adherence to light/dark mode support while maintaining a premium SaaS feel without using purple gradients.

headings.styling: Neon glow effect on main heading (text-shadow) for dark mode

matrix_background.description: A digital rain / falling code effect rendered behind the main heading.
matrix_background.implementation: Use a custom React component with an HTML5 `<canvas>`. Set absolute positioning (`absolute inset-0 z-0`). Use cyan/teal colors instead of traditional green. Draw falling characters. Ensure opacity is low so it doesn't overpower the text. Tailwind classes: `absolute inset-0 z-0 opacity-50 pointer-events-none`

glassmorphism.prompt_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] (Dark) or bg-black/5 border-black/10 (Light). Never use full transparency.

components_and_layout.global_layout: min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 md:p-8 relative overflow-hidden bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#0a0a0a] text-gray-900 dark:text-white
components_and_layout.header: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 p-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50. Include Brand/Logo on left, Light/Dark theme toggle on right.
components_and_layout.hero_section: relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto mt-20 md:mt-32
components_and_layout.main_heading: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black text-teal-700 dark:text-cyan-400 mb-8 z-10 relative text-center leading-tight dark:drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,211,238,0.4)]

prompt_interface.wrapper: w-full flex flex-col gap-3 relative z-10
prompt_interface.tab_bar: flex flex-row self-start gap-1 p-1 rounded-full bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/5 border border-black/10 dark:border-white/10 mb-1 backdrop-blur-md
prompt_interface.tab_item: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer
prompt_interface.main_card: w-full rounded-2xl bg-white/80 border border-black/10 dark:bg-zinc-900/60 dark:border-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl shadow-xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300
prompt_interface.textarea: w-full min-h-[140px] bg-transparent p-6 text-lg outline-none resize-none placeholder:text-gray-400 dark:placeholder:text-gray-500 font-sans
prompt_interface.bottom_toolbar: flex flex-row items-center justify-between p-3 bg-black/5 dark:bg-black/40 border-t border-black/5 dark:border-white/5
prompt_interface.action_buttons: flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/5 hover:bg-black/10 dark:hover:bg-white/10 border border-black/5 dark:border-white/5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors whitespace-nowrap cursor-pointer
prompt_interface.send_button: p-2 rounded-full bg-teal-700 dark:bg-cyan-400 text-white dark:text-black hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center ml-2

community_cards_section.container: flex flex-row gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 no-scrollbar snap-x
community_cards_section.card: snap-center shrink-0 w-72 p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-zinc-900/50 border border-black/10 dark:border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform cursor-pointer group
community_cards_section.card_image_placeholder: w-full h-32 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-200 to-gray-300 dark:from-zinc-800 dark:to-zinc-900 mb-4 flex items-center justify-center border border-black/5 dark:border-white/5 overflow-hidden relative

dialogs.github_save: Use Shadcn Dialog. Glassmorphic overlay (`backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40`). Card styling matches `main_card` logic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the light/dark mode color logic using Tailwind's `dark:` variant. The interface must look impeccable in both modes.

Implement the matrix background as a custom React component using HTML5 `<canvas>`. It should be positioned absolutely behind the hero section. Adjust its colors via props or classes to match the active theme (Teal for Light, Cyan for Dark).
Ensure the heading has a glowing effect in dark mode using `drop-shadow`. Do NOT use purple gradients anywhere in the app.
For the toolbar controls, utilize Shadcn's `DropdownMenu` for the AI Model Selector and LLM Provider selectors. Use Shadcn's `Switch` for the 'Ultra' toggle.

Make sure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, dropdown items, switches) include a descriptive `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="prompt-textarea"`, `data-testid="send-button"`).
The Project Type Tab Bar MUST sit structurally above the textarea as part of the prompt interface flow.
For the Community App Cards, since external images are not available, use sleek CSS gradients with a centered Lucide icon as the placeholder thumbnail.
